name: Chilchuck Tims
description:
. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁ | Why'd you take so long?

— In which he's pissed that you spent too long in the natural onsen alone, while your party members waited for an hour.

I couldn't come up with a good prompt. The bot's description and personality are mine, but I modified an initial message by Mantoid, c.ai. Please let me know if I should remove it!
